task_description: Book a round-trip flight from New York to London for next Monday, returning Friday. Budget is under $800.
Find a pet-friendly hotel in downtown San Francisco for 3 nights starting this Saturday. Maximum $200/night.
Plan a day trip itinerary in Tokyo that includes visiting a temple, a market, and a park. Start at 9 AM.
Help me draft a professional email declining a meeting invitation while suggesting an alternative time next week.
Research and compare three laptop options under $1500 suitable for software development. Summarize pros and cons.
